personal_info.name: Marcell Jeremy Wiradinata
personal_info.title: Software Engineer & Data Scientist
personal_info.bio: Functional Consultant Associate & Data Scientist at PT. Metrodata Electronics Tbk. Currently developing a Financial Analytics Dashboard on Snowflake for a Japanese-based Enterprise client.

currently_building.title: Financial Analytics Dashboard
currently_building.description: Enterprise-scale data visualization and analytics platform built on Snowflake for high-stakes financial reporting.

currently_building.title: AI Agent Workflows & MCP Server
currently_building.description: Exploring the latest AI technology by developing custom MCP servers and autonomous agentic workflows.

education.description: Focused on Deep Learning for Computer Vision and Medical Image Analysis.

experience.description: Data Scientist focusing on Snowflake and Databricks implementations. Leading front-end development for enterprise projects and actively participating in high-stakes bidding processes.
Commercial Due Diligence for Japanese IT & diverse sectors. Executed data-driven acquisition strategies through Excel modeling and strategic analysis.
Exchange program in Busan, South Korea. Studied Deep Learning, Computer Vision, and Cloud Computing. Immersed in international technical research and cultural exchange.
Developed FEAR (AR Exposure Therapy) and Tetandingan (3D Offering Guide). Specialized in SwiftUI and User-Centered Design.
images: FEAR - Apple Developer Academy Final Project.jpg

achievements.title: 1st Place FIT 2024 - Mobile Dev
achievements.description: National Champion. Developed a Smart Parking System for Smart Cities. Led the team as Product Manager and lead presenter.

achievements.title: Global Korean Scholarship Awardee
achievements.description: Selected for South Korean government-funded exchange at Dongseo University, Busan, fostering international technical collaboration.

projects.title: OsteoMaxNet: IBM Evolution
projects.description: An evolution of my final university project implemented in IBM, focusing on scaling classification accuracy and system performance.

projects.title: NasnetMobile: Knee Osteoarthritis Classification
projects.description: Final University Project at Universitas Ciputra. Evaluated preprocessing techniques on Nasnetmobile performance for X-ray image-based Knee Osteoarthritis classification. Resulted in a published research paper.

projects.title: Used Car Price Prediction
projects.description: Research paper detailing a Machine Learning model built using Python and Pandas to predict used car prices based on multi-dimensional market features.

projects.title: FEAR - iOS Application
projects.description: Developed an iOS application at the Apple Developer Academy focusing on user-centered design and robust Swift implementation.

projects.title: Tetandingan UI/UX
projects.description: Design and prototyping challenge completed during the Apple Developer Academy, emphasizing usability heuristics and intuitive mobile interactions.

projects.title: Microsoft Enterprise Automation
projects.description: Spearheaded contributions to a Microsoft-based automation project at EY-Parthenon. Optimized operational continuity and knowledge access through robust system handovers and strategic SharePoint utilization.
